input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Cascade Analytics addressed to VP_ENG. There is a separate thread with CTO. Do NOT reference or CC CTO.

dimensions.name: no_secondary_contact
dimensions.check: 'cto' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'cc' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'copy' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-021] Two ICP contacts: VP Eng + CTO. Route to VP Eng only; don't CC CTO without consent.
